ddls:
CREATE TABLE "maneuvers" (
  "maneuver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maneuver */,
  "maneuver_name" TEXT /* Name of the maneuver (e.g., Hover, Pitch) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maneuver */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the maneuver */,
  "complexity_level" TEXT /* Complexity level of the maneuver */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the maneuver was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the maneuver was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maneuver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance data entry */,
  "maneuver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the maneuver being performed */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight conditions during the maneuver */,
  "metrical_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the power metric being measured */,
  "velocity_hv" REAL /* Horizontal velocity component during the maneuver */,
  "velocity_vv" REAL /* Vertical velocity component during the maneuver */,
  "total_power" REAL /* Total power consumed during the maneuver */,
  "power_from" REAL /* Power expected from theoretical calculations */,
  "power_difference" REAL /* Difference in power consumption from expected values */,
  "percent_difference" REAL /* Percentage difference in power consumption from expected values */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the performance data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance data was collected */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_data_maneuver_id FOREIGN KEY ("maneuver_id") REFERENCES maneuvers ("maneuver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_data_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES flight_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_data_metrical_id FOREIGN KEY ("metrical_id") REFERENCES power_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "power_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each power metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the power metric (e.g., Total Power, Power Difference) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the power metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the power metric */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the power metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view data, upload report) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* Information about the user's browser or device */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user during access */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the performance report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the performance report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the report */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations based on the analysis */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the flight condition */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environmental factors affecting performance (e.g. altitude, wind speed) */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the flight */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the flight */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed during the flight */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude during the flight */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the flight conditions were recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the flight conditions were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maneuver_conditions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "maneuver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the maneuver under evaluation */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight condition during the maneuver */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the maneuver started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the maneuver ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maneuver_conditions_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES flight_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maneuver_conditions_maneuver_id FOREIGN KEY ("maneuver_id") REFERENCES maneuvers ("maneuver_id")
)
